name: Starship
first: First fully reusable orbitale lancio system, designed for Marte settlement
description: Two-stage stainless-steel vehicle with a Super Heavy booster (33 Raptor engines) and a Starship upper stage (6 Raptors). Architected around orbitale propellant transfer: a tanker variant refills Starship in LEO, enabling ~100 t a Marte superficie — orders of magnitude more than any prior launcher. Orbitale volo programme began 2023.
